title: SpectraEdge
description: This PvP texture pack completely reimagines your combat visuals for Minecraft 1.16.5 and above — built for clarity, reaction speed, and visual psychology.
body:
# SpectraEdge This time I present you a great PvP pack. This is a texture pack gives a simple texture for the armor,sword and tools in minecraft it's gives you new look and new and simple way of pvp armor ## Requirements Optifine required otherwise this pack doesn't work properly. changes in minecraft after applying the pack. changes are:- 1)Netherite armour
2)Netherite Sword
3)Diamod armour
4)Diamond Sword
5)Iron armor
6)Iron
7)Shield
8)many more things it does to discover them just download and try it once 🔂
this pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers. version supported - 1.16.5+ make sure you check the file version before downloadingit Enjoy the "Spectraedge". THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
